question: Will CPI rise more than 1.1% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI report has already been released, showing a monthly increase of only 0.3% on a seasonally adjusted basis. This is well below the 1.1% threshold required for YES resolution. The market should resolve to NO with 100% certainty, making the current 3% price significantly overvalued.
key_factors: Official BLS data shows 0.3% monthly CPI increase in March 2026
Market resolution criteria clearly not met
risks: Market inefficiency in pricing already-released data
Possible confusion between monthly vs annual rates
